episodes.title: Survival of the Filthiest: Wife School Cult Exposed
episodes.description:
Behold! I'm thrilled to talk to author, YouTuber, and blogger Kai Nicole about exploitative wife school cults- specifically one targeting black women. Many former students felt exploited and lied to while their "mentor" shames and embarrasses them online. Kai Nicole has been working hard to expose this grifting and bullying behavior, hoping to save other women from falling prey to her scam.These paid programs—promoted by online influencers—teach traditional, ultra-conservative gender roles, submission, and "unconditional respect" for husbands. Critics, mental health professionals, and former followers have widely labeled these teachings as toxic, financially predatory, and psychologically controlling.

Here is a playlist of Kai Nicole's reporting on the Wife School Cult: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLIIswURfhHngagLalnQ33Yq0fFoswoqLJ

To give some context, this is one of the wife school's founders quotes: “Let’s be honest… If Sandra Bland had a husband, she would probably be alive today. Marriage matters. Who’s your protector?” — Ro Élori Cutno

Cutno’s “Wife School” is a four-part series that, according to the company’s website, instructs women on “feminine grace, etiquette, wealth building, man charming, feminine & masculine communication, [and] the 100 things a wife needs to do to promote generational greatness,” among other things. The series of courses costs $30,000.
